segments.text: For that soulful sound use extended voicings, sevenths and ninths, rather than plain triads.
Leave space in the voicings, do not play dense blocks, so every element can breathe.
A warm Rhodes or felt piano sets the mood for the whole record.

claims.claim_text: Use extended voicings (sevenths and ninths) rather than plain triads for a soulful sound.
Leave space in the voicings instead of dense blocks so every element can breathe.
A warm Rhodes or felt piano sets the mood of the record.
